title: [colors]
text: [colors] The [colors] section of the initialization file contains settings that determine whether bright and blink video attributes are set when using Uniface index colors. Description The settings in this section are only applied if the systemcolors setting is false. Settings Blink = on | off Bright = on | off Related Links SystemColors Enables the use of default system colors as the foreground and background colors in forms. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
